## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Change type

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Fix
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Test
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Build or maintenance

## Testing evidence

List the commands run and their results.

## Security impact

Describe any security impact, or state "None."

## Documentation impact

Describe documentation changes, or state "None required."

## Checklist

- [ ] `make check` passes locally.
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or `.env` files were committed.
- [ ] The change is limited to the requested scope.
- [ ] Tests and documentation were updated where needed.
